display_name.description: The display name for the notification channel, visible in the Google Cloud Console and used to identify the channel.

labels.description: Additional metadata for the notification channel in key-value format; keys and values must be strings.

type.description: Specifies the type of notification channel, such as email, SMS, or webhook; must match a supported channel type.

user_labels.description: Custom labels to apply to the notification channel for organizational purposes. Must be a key-value pair.
